note: Add a 0.1 format bonus for completions that use the `####` answer format even when numerically wrong, so all-fail GRPO groups still get a learning signal toward GSM8K's required output structure.
Raise AdamW learning rate from 1e-6 to 5e-6 so GRPO policy updates are large enough to improve GSM8K verified accuracy within the fixed training budget.
Add a graded near-miss reward (up to 0.25 for answers within 5% relative error) so hard unit-conversion groups that fail the strict verifier still produce GRPO learning signal.
Increase GRPO group size from 8 to 16 so mixed-reward groups occur more often and advantage estimates are less noisy on hard unit-conversion prompts.
Halve prompts_per_step from 8 to 4 to restore step throughput after doubling group size to 16, enabling more GRPO updates within the fixed wall-clock budget while keeping lower-variance advantages.
Lower sampling temperature from 1.0 to 0.7 so unit-conversion rollouts are numerically sharper while G=16 preserves within-group diversity for GRPO advantage estimates.
Restore prompts_per_step to the scale default (8) because halving it to 4 regressed eval_acc from 0.875 to 0.75 under G=16 despite aiming for more GRPO steps within the wall-clock budget.
